nodes.body: <<FILL role=setup words=42 beats='rain patters on the window while Priya watches; the morning fog lifting off the beach; Grandpa smiles and says today is Seashell Morning; Priya cheers and runs to find his rain things'>>

choices.label: Put on a sun hat and beach sandals.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=setup words=40 beats='Priya tugs on a sun hat and beach sandals, zip; Grandpa opens the boardwalk gate to a drippy, shiny world that smells like wet leaves; the wet sidewalk sparkles as if it is waiting just for them'>>

<<FILL role=setup words=38 beats='a shallow tide pool by the boardwalk waits, round like a cookie, right at the start of their sandy morning beach walk; Priya does a warm-up hop, splish; Grandpa laughs and takes his hand, and they walk down to the corner'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=44 beats='at the corner the walk splits two ways; down the shaded, quiet dune path, trees drip and little puddles dot the path like polka dots; down the open beach with rolling waves, rainwater hurries along the curb in a chattering little stream; Grandpa says Priya gets to pick'>>

choices.label: Take the shaded, quiet dune path.
Take the open beach with rolling waves.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=40 beats='under the dripping trees, raindrops go plip plop on Priya's hood; he hops puddle to puddle down the polka-dot lane; then he stops, because a small scuttling sound catches his eye on the wet path just ahead'>>

choices.label: Look closer at a small scuttling sound.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=44 beats='it is the tiny hermit crab, wiggling on the hard wet path far from any dirt; just past it shines the wide, glassy tide pool, smooth as a mirror; Grandpa asks what Priya wants to do, help the tiny hermit crab get home or tiptoe to the wide, glassy tide pool'>>

choices.label: Help the tiny hermit crab home.
Tiptoe to the wide, glassy tide pool.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=38 beats='Priya finds a smooth cupped shell and Grandpa helps him scoot the tiny hermit crab gently onto it, like a tiny stretcher; slow and careful, step by step, they carry the tiny hermit crab over to the damp sand near the dunes'>>

choices.label: Set the tiny hermit crab down gently.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=completion words=45 beats='the tiny hermit crab slides into the damp sand near the dunes and does a happy wiggle, home at last; Grandpa gives Priya a high five with a squelchy glove; they splash all the way home for warm cocoa, and Priya tells the story of the tiny hermit crab at dinner'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=38 beats='the wide, glassy tide pool is the biggest puddle Priya has ever seen, flat and shiny, holding a whole upside-down sky with gulls and their own two grinning faces; Priya backs up three big steps and bends his knees'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=36 beats='Grandpa counts one, two, three; Priya runs, boots thumping, raincoat flapping, and jumps as high as he can over the wide, glassy tide pool; for one whole second he is flying'>>

choices.label: Come down with a great big Leap.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=completion words=45 beats='SPLASH; silver drops fly up like fireworks and patter down on their hoods; the wide, glassy tide pool wobbles into giggly rings; Priya is soaked and Grandpa is soaked and nobody minds one bit, because that was the biggest Leap of the whole day'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=40 beats='rainwater hurries along the curb in a busy little stream, burbling downhill; a driftwood raft sails past, spins, and zooms away; far down at the bottom of the hill, the clouds are opening and the bright morning sun pokes through'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=44 beats='Priya trots beside the chattering stream; Grandpa spots a driftwood raft in the making, and far below the bright morning sun grows brighter and warmer; Priya can race a driftwood raft down the stream, or follow the bright morning sun all the way down the hill'>>

choices.label: Follow the bright morning sun down.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=38 beats='Priya sets a driftwood raft on the stream and it zips off, bobbing and twirling through tiny rapids, past a twig and around a pebble; Priya runs alongside, cheering his boat on'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=36 beats='near the bottom of the hill the water swirls toward a striped lifeguard post, the finish line; a driftwood raft wobbles, tips, then rights itself and shoots ahead; Priya reaches out his hand just in time'>>

<<FILL role=completion words=45 beats='got it; Priya scoops up the champion Driftwood Raft right at the finish line, drippy and proud; Grandpa cheers hooray; Priya tucks the winning leaf into his pocket like a shiny medal, and they stomp-splash all the way home to tell everyone'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=38 beats='they follow the bright morning sun down the hill as the drizzle turns to sprinkles and then to nothing at all; every puddle turns gold in the new light, like little mirrors full of treasure, and the wet street begins to sparkle'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=34 beats='Grandpa stops at the bottom of the hill and points up over the rooftops; Priya tips his head way back, holds Grandpa's hand tight, and looks up, up, up'>>

<<FILL role=completion words=45 beats='a whole Sandcastle arches over the town, its bands of color glowing in the washed-clean sky; Priya and Grandpa name every color together and walk home right under it, the best surprise of Seashell Morning'>>
